title: hieracium triangulare var. subtriangulare
intro: Hieracium triangulare var. subtriangulare, also known as a type of Hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion family with a unique triangular leaf shape. The medicinal properties of Hieracium triangulare var. subtriangulare include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce swelling and promote wound healing, making it a potential remedy for skin conditions and minor injuries. Herbal preparations of Hieracium triangulare var. subtriangulare can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its benefits.
